Text:
One single continuous photograph — no panels, grids, or split frames.

Use the uploaded photo as the exact base composition. Remove all modern
businesses, logos, brands, storefront names, banners, advertisements, and
signage visible in the source image.

PRESERVE (must match source exactly)
- gas station canopy building at center lot over pump islands, 1 story
- service station office building at rear right corner, 1 story
- open service bay building at rear left corner, 1 story
- immutable elements: canopy with four corner support posts, pump island with eight dispensers, north and south driveway aprons
Keep this location instantly recognizable.

OUTPUT FORMAT
Create a TRUE 9:16 vertical portrait image — one single frame. Expand the SAME
scene naturally above (sky) and below (street/pavement) — this is canvas
extension of one photograph, not additional panels. Do not stretch or distort
the source geometry.

TRANSFORM TO 1995
Clinton era prosperity. A 1995 self-serve station — wide canopy over multiple islands, attached convenience store, the first pay-at-pump card readers.

PERIOD DETAILS
- self-service only standard
- self-serve pumps, some fitted with new credit-card readers
- price sign showing gas around $1.15
Typography: clean geometric sans-serif, early digital influence.

PEOPLE
EXACTLY 7 people, spread out with empty areas.
- a driver checking tire pressure at the air station
- a driver self-serving at the pump
Clothing: men in grunge style, flannel shirts; women in high-waisted mom jeans, chokers. Fashion palette: forest green, maroon, mustard yellow. No posing or eye contact.

VEHICLES
EXACTLY 4 period vehicles, all different:
- 1991-1996 Chevrolet Caprice — whale-shaped, rounded full-size — black
- 1992-1997 Ford Taurus — rounded jellybean shape, oval theme — white
- 1995-1999 Dodge Neon — small rounded economy, friendly face — burgundy
- 1992-1996 Ford F-150 — rounded aero body — navy blue
Parked with gaps; optionally 1 driving; no vehicle newer than 1995.

ENVIRONMENT
- road markings: yellow center line, white edge lines, turn lane arrows
- utilities: overhead power lines standard, cable TV and early phone data lines on poles

TREES
- cottonwood tree at northeast corner of lot: very young sapling
- elm tree at sidewalk edge left of entrance: very young sapling
- cedar tree at back fence line: established tree, modest canopy

PHOTOGRAPHIC STYLE
COLOR photograph — Kodak Gold 200 or Fujifilm Superia 200 look.
Color: neutral to slightly warm tones. Grain: fine grain, cleaner than 1985.
Photorealistic — NOT black-and-white, no HDR.

PRIVACY
Blur all faces and license plates.
SelectedVehicles: 1992-1997 Ford Taurus — rounded jellybean shape, oval theme
1995-1999 Dodge Neon — small rounded economy, friendly face
